content.en_text: brain, we found that its weight was quite

content.en_text: the male's virility to other females,

content.en_text: important discoveries is that it is

content.cn_text: 大象长寿是至关重要的。
content.en_text: crucial for elephants to live for a long

content.en_text: won't be a successful mate unless you do.

content.cn_text: 如果你是一头雌象，年龄越大、经验越丰富，
content.en_text: If you are a female, the older and more

content.en_text: that you'll be aware of danger when it approaches.

content.cn_text: 例如，一头大象可能能够应对一只狮子，

content.en_text: but may have problems if there are three of them.

content.en_text: away or to stand and fight.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 31–40

items.title: Records of many elephants’ dates of birth and also of their 31. __________ have been kept.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第31题问 records 记录了出生日期以及它们的什么，原文说 who was the mother of each one，因此答案是 mother。

items.title: The social system of elephants has many 32. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第32题问大象的社会系统有许多什么，原文说 a large number of different layers，因此答案是 layers。

items.title: Two elephants worked together to get food using a 33. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第33题问两头大象合作用什么获得食物，原文说 pulling simultaneously on the ends of a rope，因此答案是 rope。

items.title: Some moved to a new area when there was a lack of 34. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第34题问一些大象在缺少什么时迁到新地区，原文说 there was not enough rain，因此答案是 rain。

items.title: They may move the 35. __________ of another elephant after death.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第35题问大象死后，其他大象可能会移动它的什么，原文说 stroke and rearrange the bones，因此答案是 bones。

items.title: Their brain 36. __________ is quite high in comparison with that of their body.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第36题问大象大脑的什么与身体相比相当高，原文说 its weight was quite high compared with that of its body，因此答案是 weight。

items.title: The way they 37. __________ is one obvious change.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第37题问雄象一个明显变化是它们如何什么，原文说 changes is in how they walk，因此答案是 walk。

items.title: Older males make better mates: older females recognize 38. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第38题问年长雌象能识别什么，原文说 be aware of danger when it approaches，因此答案是 danger。

items.title: How elephants use smell – difficult to study this in the 39. __________.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第39题问研究大象如何使用嗅觉很难在什么地方进行，原文说 in the wild，因此答案是 wild。

items.title: How 40. __________ elephants are to one another.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第40题问大象彼此之间有多么什么，原文说 one elephant can be sensitive towards the feelings or situation of another，因此答案是 sensitive。

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
Elephant research in Amboseli
Methodology
• The elephant population has been studied for almost forty years.
• Records of many elephants’ dates of birth and also of their $31$ have been kept.
• Play-back of elephant calls and DNA analysis were also used.
Findings
• The social system of elephants has many $32$.
• Two elephants worked together to get food using a $33$.
• Some moved to a new area when there was a lack of $34$.
• They may move the $35$ of another elephant after death.
• Their brain $36$ is quite high in comparison with that of their body.
Male elephants
• The way they $37$ is one obvious change.
• Older males make better mates: older females recognize $38$.
What still needs to be discovered
• How elephants use smell – difficult to study this in the $39$.
• How $40$ elephants are to one another.
